title: BetterBank - Rekt
relevance_summary: Liquidity manipulation followed by bonus minting abuse on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that creates an LP pair involving a newly minted token and a pre-existing token.
prevention.trigger: CREATE2 -> LP_CREATION with one token being freshly minted and the other existing.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that performs bulk swaps followed by bonus minting within the same transaction.

red_flags: Bulk swapping followed by bonus minting
monitoring_rules: Block CREATE2 followed by BULK_SWAP and BONUS_MINT in the same transaction.
summary: BetterBank's bonus minting system was exploited through liquidity manipulation, allowing attackers to create fake liquidity pools and harvest infinite rewards. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for CREATE2 followed by bulk swaps and bonus minting in the same transaction.
